get.description: Search for cards using a full text search query. The `query` parameter will be used to perform a full text search on the card's text. Use the `set_id` query parameter to filter by the Riftbound set, and the `sort` and `dir` parameters to sort the results.

get.description: Search for cards by name. Use the `exact` parameter for an exact name match (case insensitive), or the `fuzzy` parameter for a fuzzy name match (case insensitive). To search for cards with an exact name match, use `/cards/name?exact=master+yi+honed`. To search for cards with a fuzzy name match, use `/cards/name?fuzzy=yi+hone`.

get.description: Get a list of all unique keywords found across all cards in the database.
Get a list of card names found across all cards in the database.
Get a list of card types found across all cards in the database.
Get a list of card supertypes found across all cards in the database.
Get a list of card domains found across all cards in the database.
Get a list of card rarities found across all cards in the database.
Get a list of card artists found across all cards in the database.
Get a list of all possible energy values found across all cards in the database.
Get a list of all possible might values found across all cards in the database.
Get a list of all possible power values found across all cards in the database.
Get a list of all unique tags found across all cards in the database.

energy.title: Energy
energy.description: The card's energy cost, if any

might.title: Might
might.description: The card's might value, if any

power.title: Power
power.description: The card's power value, if any

id.title: Id
id.description: The unique Riftcodex identifier for the card.

tcgplayer_id.title: Tcgplayer Id
tcgplayer_id.description: The card's TCGPlayer ID, also known as the `productID`.

collector_number.title: Collector Number
collector_number.description: The card's collector number within its set.

attributes.description: An object containing the card's attributes, such as energy cost, might, power, etc.

classification.description: An object containing the card's classification, such as type, supertype, rarity, domain.

text.description: An object containing the card's text, including rich text, plain text, and flavour text.

set.description: An object containing the card's set information, including set ID and label.

media.description: An object containing the card's media information, including image URL, artist, and accessibility text.

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: A list of tags associated with the card, such as Freljord, Noxus, etc.

orientation.title: Orientation
orientation.description: The card's orientation, either portrait or landscape

metadata.description: An object containing the card's metadata

set_id.title: Set Id
set_id.description: The set's unique identifier, e.g. `OGN`, `OGS`, etc.

supertype.title: Supertype
supertype.description: The card's supertype, if any, e.g. `Champion`, `Token`

total.title: Total
total.description: The total number of unique values for the given index type.

type.title: Type
type.description: The type of index, e.g. `keywords`, `sets`, `types`, etc.

values.title: Values
values.description: The list of unique values for the given index type.

image_url.title: Image Url
image_url.description: The URL of the card's image

artist.title: Artist
artist.description: The name of the card's artist

clean_name.title: Clean Name
clean_name.description: The card's 'clean name', so without any special characters

updated_on.title: Updated On
updated_on.description: The date and time when the card was last updated in the Riftcodex database, in ISO 8601 format

alternate_art.title: Alternate Art
alternate_art.description: Whether the card has alternate art or not.

overnumbered.title: Overnumbered
overnumbered.description: Whether the card is overnumbered or not.

signature.title: Signature
signature.description: Whether the card is a signature card or not.

id.title: Id
id.description: The unique Riftcodex identifier for the set.

card_count.title: Card Count
card_count.description: The number of cards in the set, if known.

tcgplayer_id.title: Tcgplayer Id
tcgplayer_id.description: The set's TCGPlayer ID, if known. Also known as the `groupID` in TCGPlayer.

cardmarket_id.title: Cardmarket Id
cardmarket_id.description: The set's Cardmarket ID(s), if known. Can be a string or a list of strings.

published_on.title: Published On
published_on.description: The date when the set was published, in ISO 8601 format.

rich.title: Rich
rich.description: The card's text with rich formatting

plain.title: Plain
plain.description: The card's text with plain formatting

flavour.title: Flavour
flavour.description: The card's flavour text, if any
